violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Trailer: ensure sanitizing solution used for wet wiping cloths available.
General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Building: cover used on wire storage shelves must be a cleanable and non-absorbent material. (currently a pink cloth)

Prep/vegetable sink. — --Plumbing fixtures are not plumbed with a physical air gap on the drain line. - espresso machine, dipper well. Handwash sink, dishwasher, ice bin, ice maker and Coke machine drain lines extend below the grate cover on the floor drains.
